downstream_consumers: Any agent or human reading CLI.md for coderef-analyze, coderef-query, coderef-detect-languages, or coderef-semantic-integration reference

risks.title: Flag documentation drift if source files change after doc authoring
risks.mitigation: Flags sourced from actual parseArgs definitions in source files at time of authoring. IMP-CORE-088 covers adding tests that would catch drift.

risks.title: Existing CLI.md sections touched accidentally
risks.mitigation: Only append new sections and update Command Overview table. No edits to existing sections.

changes: Add 4 rows to Command Overview table
Add coderef-query section (8 query types, 5 flags)

dependencies: src/cli/coderef-analyze.ts — source of truth for flags and analysis types
src/cli/coderef-query.ts — source of truth for flags and query types
src/cli/detect-languages-cli.ts — source of truth for flags
src/cli/semantic-integration-cli.ts — source of truth for flags

decision_records.decision: Document coderef-detect-languages (not detect-languages) as the bin entry name
decision_records.rationale: package.json bin entry added in dispatch-012 is 'coderef-detect-languages' pointing to detect-languages-cli.ts; the old CLI.md 'detect-languages' section documents a different (pre-existing) CLI.

decision_records.decision: Document coderef-semantic-integration (not semantic-integration) as the bin entry name
decision_records.rationale: package.json bin entry added in dispatch-012 is 'coderef-semantic-integration' pointing to semantic-integration-cli.ts.
